subcodes.first_line: The world hath been illumined by the Most Great Light, yet the people remain veiled in thick darkness. Mount Sinai hath soared in its longing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اضاء العالم من النیر الاعظم ولکن القوم فی حجاب غلیظ قد طار الطور شوقا
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @proclamation to the people of the world
